zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Bardolph於大約1375年出生在英國諾福爾可喬加時，她的父親William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf27歲，母親Agnes Poynings27歲。她於大約1396年與Robert Scales 5th Baron Scales在英國英格蘭哈普爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1441年1月21日在蘇格蘭培爾培斯享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Bardolph于大约1375年出生在英国諾福爾可喬加时，她的父亲William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf27岁，母亲Agnes Poynings27岁。她于大约1396年与Robert Scales 5th Baron Scales在英国英格兰哈普爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1441年1月21日在苏格兰培爾培斯享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bardolph
meanings: From the name Bertulph; renowned for help.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Bardolph was born about 1375, in Wormegay, Norfolk, England, her father, William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf, was 27 and her mother, Agnes Poynings, was 27. She married Robert Scales 5th Baron Scales about 1396, in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 21 January 1441, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Bardolph est née environ 1375, à Wormegay, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Agnes Poynings, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Scales 5th Baron Scales environ 1396, à Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 21 janvier 1441, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Bardolph um 1375 in Wormegay, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf 27 und ihre Mutter Agnes Poynings 27. Sie hat um 1396 in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom Robert Scales 5th Baron Scales geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 21. Januar 1441 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Bardolph è nata il circa 1375 nel Wormegay, Norfolk, England, sua padre, William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Agnes Poynings, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Robert Scales 5th Baron Scales circa 1396, nel Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 21 gennaio 1441, nel Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Bardolphが約1375年にイギリスノーフォルクウオルメガイで生まれた時，父William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolfは27歳，母Agnes Poyningsは27歳であった。約1396年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアでRobert Scales 5th Baron Scalesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1441年1月21日にスコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Bardolph(이)가 대략 1375년 영국 노르폴크 워메가이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Poynings(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1396년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르에서 Robert Scales 5th Baron Scales(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1441년 1월 21일 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Bardolph nasceu aproximadamente 1375, em Wormegay, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Poynings, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Scales 5th Baron Scales aproximadamente 1396, em Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 21 de janeiro de 1441, em Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Bardolph родилась около 1375 г. в местности вормегеи, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Poynings, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Scales 5th Baron Scales около 1396 г. в местности хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 21 января 1441 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Bardolph nació aproximadamente 1375, en Wormegay, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Agnes Poynings, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Robert Scales 5th Baron Scales aproximadamente 1396, en Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 21 de enero de 1441, en Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, a la edad de 67 años.
